title: Impressions of a printer oral history transcript
creator: Hoffman, Richard J., interviewee
Docter, Richard F., interviewer
University of California, Los Angeles. Oral History Program
description: Transcript of a 4.5-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program

Hoffman recalls his early years in Los Angeles, his training and work as a fine printer, and discusses the printshop and printing management program at Los Angeles City College and California State University Los Angeles, respectively
The Bancroft Library, University of California, Berkeley
Printer and educator in printing management
Forms part of: Oral History collection, Dept. of Special Collections, University Library, University of California, Los Angeles
